landing_hero_desc: View, share, and review your CAD files directly in the browser. Support for STEP, STP, STL, and OBJ formats. Secure collaboration for engineering teams.
landing_sponsors_title: Supported Formats: STEP, STL, OBJ, IGES, PLY
landing_features_subtitle: Streamline your 3D workflow without expensive CAD software.
landing_features_1_desc: Don't let file formats stop you. Open STEP (.stp), STL, and OBJ files instantly. Compatible with SolidWorks, Fusion 360, and Blender exports.
landing_features_2_desc: Stop sending heavy email attachments. Generate a secure link to share 3D models with clients. They view it instantly without installing anything.
landing_features_3_desc: Render large assemblies smoothly in your browser. VizCad processes complex STEP files efficiently, so you spend time reviewing, not waiting.
landing_features_4_desc: Organize your 3D assets in one secure place. Access your version history and keep your team synced with the latest design changes.
landing_showcase_subtitle: Powerful tools to review designs and get feedback faster.
landing_showcase_collab_desc: Invite stakeholders to your project. Add comments, markups, and measurements directly on the 3D model to speed up the approval process.
landing_showcase_sharing_desc: Deliver your work professionally. Send a view-only link to clients. They can rotate and inspect the model on any device, no login required.
landing_showcase_studio_desc: Need a quick render for a report? Use ModelSnap to capture high-quality images of your 3D model with studio lighting in seconds.
landing_cta_desc: Join thousands of engineers and designers using VizCad to view and share 3D models online. Secure, fast, and free to start.
landing_cta_button: Start for Free - No Credit Card
footer_company_desc: VizCad is a cloud-based 3D collaboration platform and online STP viewer. We make CAD file sharing and viewing accessible to everyone.
pricing_subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your needs and discover the power of 3D visualization.
pricing_free_description: Perfect starter plan for small projects and individual users.
pricing_premium_description: Advanced features for professionals and teams.

header.title: Frequently Asked
header.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about VizCAD's features, capabilities, and how to get the most out of our 3D visualization platform.

card.title: Common Questions
card.description: Click on any question below to see the answer

what-is-vizcad.question: What is VizCAD?
what-is-vizcad.answer: VizCAD is a platform that allows you to easily visualize your existing CAD designs through the web without the need for complex software. It helps professionals like engineers, architects, and product designers to quickly and professionally visualize their designs.

supported-browsers.question: Which browsers should I use for VizCAD?
supported-browsers.answer: VizCAD works on all modern web browsers with WebGL support. You can access it from any device such as a computer, tablet, or mobile phone.

file-formats.question: What file formats does VizCAD support?
file-formats.answer: VizCAD currently supports STL, OBJ, PLY, and 3MF file formats.

getting-started.question: How do I get started with VizCAD?
getting-started.answer: Getting started with VizCAD is quite easy. You just need to drag and drop your STL, OBJ, PLY, or 3MF file directly into your browser. No software installation or account creation is required.

system-requirements.question: What are the system requirements?
system-requirements.answer: The application runs entirely in your web browser, so no special installation is required. A modern browser with WebGL support is sufficient for a smooth experience. Performance may vary depending on the browser and device specifications.

collaboration.question: Can I collaborate with others on VizCAD projects?
collaboration.answer: VizCAD emerged to solve the problem of accessing design files during teamwork. While the application makes designs accessible to everyone, there is currently no information about built-in collaboration features.

is-it-free.question: Is VizCAD free to use?
is-it-free.answer: Yes, VizCAD is designed with a Freemium model. With this model, you can use the core features for free. Premium subscription options will be offered for access to more advanced tools and features.

data-security.question: How secure is my data in VizCAD?
data-security.answer: VizCAD performs client-side rendering instead of using a cloud-based system. This means your data is processed locally, in your browser, as much as possible. This approach increases security by eliminating the need to store your files on external servers.

how-is-it-different.question: How does VizCAD differ from competitors like AutoCAD?
how-is-it-different.answer: VizCAD's biggest difference is that it offers a professional service with a user-friendly interface, unlike complex and expensive software like Autodesk. Unlike amateur-level CAD viewers on the market, VizCAD allows all users to convert their designs into high-quality visuals without needing extensive software knowledge.

development-process.question: What was VizCAD's development process like and what were the main turning points?
development-process.answer: The initial MVP (Minimum Viable Product) version of VizCAD was just a CAD file preview tool. Based on user feedback, the decision was made to focus on visualization tools rather than technical features. This transformation turned the product from a simple preview tool into a powerful visualization platform and led to a redesign of the product roadmap.
